title: eragrostis lingulata
intro: Eragrostis lingulata, also known as Devil's Needle or Snake Grass, is a type of grass native to various parts of the world, particularly in Australia and Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis lingulata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
